标题: Brunello Cucinelli BC steel diamond sandals, a modern and elegant style inspired by classic designs. Made with precious imported lambskin showcasing unique patterns, paired with a lightweight leather sole for comfort and style. A classic shoe that you won't want to take off once you put it on. Available in sizes 35-40 (custom size 40 not eligible for returns or exchanges).

Brunello Cucinelli 25ss Spring/Summer new casual sneakers with shimmering stones. The classic retro sports shoe series from Brunello Cucinelli, a renowned Italian brand known for its minimalist style and handmade pearl chain accessories. Vintage yet sophisticated, simple yet elegant, suitable for any occasion, be it daily work or fashion. Made of imported cowhide, water-dyed sheepskin lining, original rubber outsole, and custom-made pearl chain decoration. Available in sizes 35-42 (custom sizes 40, 41, 42 are non-returnable).

25ss Spring/Summer new BC mule sandals for personal shopping. Who can resist such a pair of BC shoes! Must share with everyone.
